creator: herve.quiroz@esil.univ-mrs.fr
text:
Hi,

I can't reproduce the error you experience:

$ /usr/local/etc/rc.d/tomcat55 start
Starting tomcat55.
$ /usr/local/etc/rc.d/tomcat55 status
tomcat55 is running as pid 34159.
$ /usr/local/etc/rc.d/tomcat55 stop
Stopping tomcat55.

Did you set any specific option in rc.conf?

Herve
